mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A monthly decline in unemployment rate below 3.5% signals strong labor market conditions that boost corporate earnings visibility, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 5-day returns in periods with UNRATE < 3.5 are not significantly positive (t-test p > 0.05) or the signal's IC drops below 0.05.

mechanism_narrative: Strong quarterly GDP growth (GDPC1) indicates robust economic activity that supports corporate profitability, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 60-day returns in quarters with GDPC1 growth > 2% are not significantly positive (t-test p > 0.05) or the signal's IC drops below 0.05.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly CPI reading above 304.348 (current level) signals elevated inflation expectations that prompt central bank tightening, resulting in negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20-day returns in periods with CPIAUCSL > 304.348 are not significantly negative (t-test p > 0.05) or the signal's IC drops below -0.05.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous declines in housing starts (HOUST) and consumer spending (RSAFS) indicate weakening demand, generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20-day returns in periods with joint HOUST/RSAFS declines are not significantly negative (t-test p > 0.05) or the interaction effect's IC drops below -0.05.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly drop in industrial production (INDPRO) below 102.2468 signals supply-side disruptions that reduce corporate margins, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 5-day returns in periods with INDPRO < 102.2468 are not significantly negative (t-test p > 0.05) or the signal's IC drops below -0.05.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly payroll gain above 156,342k (current level) indicates strong employment growth that drives consumer spending, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20-day returns in periods with PAYEMS > 156342 are not significantly positive (t-test p > 0.05) or the signal's IC drops below 0.05.

mechanism_narrative: A combination of rising housing starts (HOUST) and declining consumer sentiment (RSAFS) creates conflicting demand signals that result in negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 60-day returns in periods with HOUST/RSAFS divergences are not significantly negative (t-test p > 0.05) or the interaction effect's IC drops below -0.05.
